Llm._comment: Only a tie-breaker if BOTH OpenAI:Enabled and Anthropic:Enabled are true. Set to "openai" or "anthropic". Override with LLM_PROVIDER env var.

OpenAI._comment: Never commit a real key. Set OPENAI_API_KEY as an environment variable or in Azure Key Vault. Set Enabled to true/false via OPENAI_ENABLED env var — this, not key presence, decides whether this provider is used.

Anthropic._comment: Set Enabled to true/false via ANTHROPIC_ENABLED env var — this, not key presence, decides whether this provider is used. Set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var too when enabling.

Koru._comment: Base URL of the koru-main backend. Set KORU_BASE_URL and KORU_API_KEY env vars.

Jwt._comment: Must match the JWT signing key used by koru-main. Set JWT_KEY, JWT_ISSUER, JWT_AUDIENCE env vars.

Redis._comment: Azure Cache for Redis connection string. Set REDIS_CONNECTION env var. When absent, falls back to in-memory stores.

KeyVault._comment: Optional Azure Key Vault URL (e.g. https://my-vault.vault.azure.net/). Set KEY_VAULT_URL env var. When set, secrets are pulled from Key Vault at startup using Managed Identity.

Swagger._comment: Set to true to expose Swagger UI in production (disabled by default). Enabled automatically in Development.

Cors._comment: Set CORS_ORIGINS env var to the production frontend URL (e.g. https://app.studiotechbi.com). Multiple origins: add Cors:AllowedOrigins:1, :2, etc. as separate App Service settings.
